name: ~🟡 - YELLOW - (LUCKY BLOCK EP)
description:
🔵 BLUE!POV

_________

READ B4 CHATTING!

-This bot CONTAINS HEAVY HEAD CANNONS. If that’s something you’re going to be upset over, probably don’t chat. (APPEARANCE BELOW)

-I, like the vast majority of bot creators, can not control exactly what the bot says / does. If it does something you don’t like, you can always generate a new message or edit the original message. These buttons are there for a reason.

-This bot contains some spoilers for Animations Vs Minecraft! You have been warned!

_________

What if I love him?

I reaaaallly love the Lucky Block episode. Ik I typically try and keep my bots openPOV, but this is specifically written for a Blue POV (Though, I used pronoun macros bc I know people can’t decide on a gender HC for them). This bot takes place AFTER the episode!

Really self-indulgent, actually. I just need my angst. Leave me alone </3

_________

APPEARANCE (This is NOT exactly how it’s described in the bot.)

-Lemon yellow skin (obv)

-Spiky, messy hair

-Little white head wings w/ yellow tipped feathers

-Orange, high-necked jacket

-Baggy, brown cargo pants

-Square frame glasses

-Possible goggles and gloves
creator: EYELESSV01D
